languages.text: "Исключено". {n}Эоганн покачивает головой.{/n} "Исход предлагаемого сотрудничества предопределен, и он чрезвычайно неблагоприятен, Вольный Торговец".
"Out of the question." {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "The outcome of the proposed cooperation is predetermined, and it is most unfavourable, Rogue Trader."
languages.original_text: "Исключено". {n}Эоганн покачивает головой.{/n} "Исход предлагаемого сотрудничества предопределен, и он чрезвычайно неблагоприятен, Вольный Торговец".

languages.text: "Das kommt nicht in Frage." {n}Eogunn schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Das Ergebnis der vorgeschlagenen Kooperation steht bereits fest und ist ausgesprochen unvorteilhaft, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "The outcome of the proposed cooperation is predetermined, and it is most unfavourable, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Das kommt nicht in Frage." {n}Eogunn schüttelt den Kopf.{/n} "Das Ergebnis der vorgeschlagenen Kooperation steht bereits fest und ist ausgesprochen unvorteilhaft, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: « Il n'en est pas question, {n}dit Eogunn en secouant la tête.{/n} L'issue de la coopération proposée est déjà toute tracée, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, et elle n'est pas des plus favorables. »
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "The outcome of the proposed cooperation is predetermined, and it is most unfavourable, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'en est pas question, {n}dit Eogunn en secouant la tête.{/n} L'issue de la coopération proposée est déjà toute tracée, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, et elle n'est pas des plus favorables. »

languages.text: “绝无可能。”{n}伊奥贡摇了摇头。{/n}“提议合作的结果早已注定，而且对我们极其不利，行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "The outcome of the proposed cooperation is predetermined, and it is most unfavourable, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “绝无可能。”{n}伊奥贡摇了摇头。{/n}“提议合作的结果早已注定，而且对我们极其不利，行商浪人。”

languages.text: «Impensable». {n}Eogunn niega con la cabeza.{/n} «El resultado de la cooperación propuesta está predeterminado y no es nada favorable, Comerciante Independiente».
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "The outcome of the proposed cooperation is predetermined, and it is most unfavourable, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «Impensable». {n}Eogunn niega con la cabeza.{/n} «El resultado de la cooperación propuesta está predeterminado y no es nada favorable, Comerciante Independiente».

languages.text: 「問題外だ」{n}エオガンは首を横に振る。{/n}「提案された協力の結果はあらかじめ決まっており、それは最も不利なものだ、ローグ・トレーダー」
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "The outcome of the proposed cooperation is predetermined, and it is most unfavourable, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: 「問題外だ」{n}エオガンは首を横に振る。{/n}「提案された協力の結果はあらかじめ決まっており、それは最も不利なものだ、ローグ・トレーダー」

languages.text: "Söz konusu bile olamaz." {n}Eogunn, başını iki yana sallıyor.{/n} "Önerilen iş birliğinin sonucu önceden belirlenmiştir ve son derece elverişsizdir Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "Out of the question." {n}Eogunn shakes his head.{/n} "The outcome of the proposed cooperation is predetermined, and it is most unfavourable, Rogue Trader."
